overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG showing a character in dark robes exploring a grand medieval dining hall with vaulted ceilings, floating candles, and house banners. The character walks past long dining tables filled with students, ascends the front platform, turns around, and walks back toward the large entrance doors.

scene_state.functional_zone: great hall right aisle with dining tables

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the right side of the hall past long dining tables where students are seated

entered.detail: hundreds of candles suspended in mid-air illuminating the hall
dark blue and purple banners hanging from the ceiling
tall stone columns supporting the vaulted ceiling
large gothic windows with colored glass panels
long wooden tables with green tablecloths and food

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the right side of a vast medieval dining hall. Floating candles and house banners hang from the vaulted ceiling high above. Students sit at long dining tables covered with food and green tablecloths. Stone pillars line the left side while stained glass windows cast colored light into the space.

scene_state.functional_zone: raised front platform with head table

events.description: character ascends the stepped wooden platform at the front of the hall
character turns around 180 degrees to face the hall

agents.ego_description: walking up the circular steps to the front platform, then turning to survey the great hall

entered.detail: raised circular wooden platform with curved benches
long table on the platform for faculty or staff

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the raised wooden platform at the front of the hall where the head table and podium stand. After reaching the center of the platform, the character turns around to face the length of the hall. The perspective shifts to show the entire dining hall stretching back toward the entrance.

events.description: character slows while approaching the large wooden entrance doors

agents.ego_description: walking down the center aisle toward the entrance, passing between rows of dining tables

entered.detail: large ornate wooden double doors with metal studs and carvings
stone torch holders with flames flanking the entrance

segments.scene_description: Walking down the central aisle from the front platform, the character moves between the rows of dining tables toward the entrance. The house banners and floating candles now appear in the distance. The character approaches the large wooden entrance doors flanked by burning wall sconces, slowing down as they reach the exit.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a grand medieval dining hall, transitioning from an intimate walk past student tables to a sweeping panoramic view and a final retreat toward the exit. It begins with the character moving along the right side of the hall, passing long tables with green cloths under a vaulted ceiling filled with floating candles and house banners. As the character reaches the front of the room, the camera ascends a raised wooden platform toward the head table and podium before pivoting to face the entire length of the hall. The scene then shifts as the character descends from the platform, walking back down the central aisle while the banners and candles recede into the distance. Finally, the movement concludes as the character approaches the large wooden entrance doors flanked by burning wall sconces.
